title: lepidium crenatum
intro: Lepidium crenatum, also known as crepidia, is a species of flowering plant in the mustard family (Brassicaceae). It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, such as reducing fever, soothing digestive issues, and acting as a diuretic. Lepidium crenatum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to treat respiratory issues, skin conditions, and other ailments.
